overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring the protagonist Geralt walking along a forest path beside a stream at dusk. The character passes a small stone hut and dead wolf creatures while approaching a large stone tower ruin in a dark, atmospheric woodland setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with small stone hut and stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path, passing the small stone hut on the left with the stream on the right

entered.detail: small rectangular stone building with dark doorway
narrow waterway running alongside the dirt path
tall dark stone tower visible through the trees in the distance
dense evergreen trees surrounding the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking past a small stone hut on the left, following a dirt path alongside a stream. The dense pine forest creates an enclosed atmosphere, with a large stone tower ruin visible in the far distance through the trees.

events.description: moving away from the stone hut area into denser forest

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding forest path toward the distant tower

segments.scene_description: Having left the stone hut behind, Geralt continues through the dense pine forest. The stream falls back into the distance on the right while the stone tower grows slightly larger ahead on the left.

events.description: encountering dead wolf creatures lying on the path

agents.ego_description: walking past dead wolves lying on the forest floor

notable_agents.action: dead wolves lying motionless on the path

entered.detail: fallen brown wolf creatures lying on the dirt path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt approaches the tower, he passes several dead wolves lying on the path. The stream is no longer visible, and the stone tower looms much closer on the left side of the frame.

events.description: arriving at the base of the large stone tower

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone tower ruin, moving past the dead creatures

entered.detail: wooden bridge or ramp structure leading up to the tower

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the base of the stone tower, which now dominates the center of the frame. The dead wolves are left behind as a wooden structure becomes visible on the left, suggesting an entrance to the tower.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense pine forest that transitions from a riverside path to the imposing base of a stone ruin. It begins with Geralt walking past a small stone hut along a dirt path beside a flowing stream, with a distant tower barely visible through the trees. As he moves deeper into the woods, the stream recedes into the distance while the stone tower grows larger and more prominent on the left. The scene then shifts as Geralt passes several dead wolves strewn across the path, causing the tower to loom closer and dominate the frame. Finally, the camera reaches the base of the massive stone structure, leaving the fallen creatures behind to reveal a wooden entrance on the left.
